Specialties | Biscuits & Gravy Plate*.description: Two open-faced cheddar drop biscuits, smothered with our signature sawmill gravy and served with two eggs with choice of side

Specialties | Chicken & Waffles.description: Belgian waffle topped with Chef Art's famous fried chicken thighs, drizzled with hot honey sauce. Served dusted with powdered sugar, with berries and cane syrup with choice of side

Specialties | French Toast.description: Thick slices of griddled bread dusted with powdered sugar and served with spiced cane syrup and seasonal fruit with choice of side

Specialties | Fried Egg & Avocado Toast*.description: Grilled multigrain bread topped with house made avocado spread, fried egg, arugula, radish and pickled red onion. Drizzled with olive oil and lemon with choice of side

Specialties | Grand-Daddy Plate*.description: Three eggs any style, pecan-smoked bacon, griddled country ham, cheddar cheese drop biscuit with choice of side

Specialties | Hallelujah Biscuit*.description: Open-faced biscuit topped with Chef Art’s famous fried chicken, two over easy eggs, pimento cheese, pecan-smoked bacon and smothered in sawmill gravy with choice of side.

Specialties | Short Rib Hash*.description: Two sunny side up eggs over diced potatoes, grilled corn succotash, onions, red bell and Fresno peppers for a bit of a kick. Served with a cheddar cheese drop biscuit with choice of side

Specialties | Steak & Egg Plate*.description: A brunch-sized portion of country fried steak, smothered in sawmill gravy and topped with two over easy eggs. Served with a cheddar cheese drop biscuit and choice of side

Specialties | Traditional Benedict*.description: An oversized toasted English muffin topped with Canadian bacon, two over easy eggs and pimento hollandaise sauce with choice of side

Specialties | Ultimate Breakfast Sandwic.description: A perfectly fried egg atop a maple pork sausage patty, crispy bacon and griddled country ham. Topped with melted pimento cheese, tomato bacon jam and served on toasted sourdough with choice of side

Specialties | Veggie Skillet*.description: A country-style skillet of tender chickpeas, roasted tomatoes, red and green peppers, and a dash of Southern seasoning. Topped with two eggs cooked your way and finished with a hearty dollop of sour cream with choice of side

Starters | Biscuits.description: Cheddar cheese drop biscuits served with choice of blackberry fig jam or sawmill gravy

Starters | Blueberry Buckle.description: Our house made blueberry coffee cake topped with vanilla glaze and garnished with fresh berries and mint

Starters | Everglazed Doughnuts.description: Mini glazed doughnuts, baked fresh daily by our neighbors at Everglazed! Topped with pecans and bacon for $2

Starters | Jasper Board.description: An array of Southern charcuterie. Shaved honey ham, smoked sausage, pimento cheese, smoked salmon dip, tomato-bacon jam, B&B pickles, crostini and crackers.
